calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar May-18-2026 Continued To Jun-22-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Patrick McNulty, for Mark Hernandez.

At the outset, the court and counsel discuss the efforts of searching for heirs. The court advises counsel that it would like for additional heir search and the matter is continued to Jun-22-2026 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Michael McNaughton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Petrucci. Not Reported.
